reference_images.label: reflect_academy_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Academy hall color rhythm, duel staging, card layout balance, and warm-versus-cool lighting anchor.

reference_images.label: reflect_academy_player
reference_images.purpose: Player silhouette, costume layering, hand pose, and magical focus posture anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use ImageBundle for the timing bar inside Bevy UI and keep it anchored to the bottom center safe area.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load ui/ui_timing_bar_600x30.png through AssetServer during HUD setup and store the handle under ui_timing_bar_600x30.
runtime_notes: HUD stays in screen space and does not parallax with the duel camera.
Gameplay timing logic uses authored zone widths from metadata rather than sampling pixel colors.
The bar should remain readable at the minimum supported 1280x720 window size.

context.usage: Bottom-center timing bar that shows perfect and good windows whenever a projectile is active.

shape.silhouette: Long framed bar with a narrow perfect center and wider good zones.

specs.lighting: Cyan center glow and lime side bands sit on a navy base with gold trim.

acceptance_criteria: Perfect zone width is 48 px and sits centered inside the bar.
Good zones extend 126 px on each side of the perfect zone and stay visually distinct from the navy base.
